scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n SHARED,API,WEB -c yellow,cyan,magenta "npm -w shared run dev" "npm -w server run dev" "npm -w client run dev"
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:server && npm run build:client
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:shared && npm -w server run typecheck && npm -w client run typecheck
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run build
